questions.question: Name the comedy duo, one a debonair singer and the other a slapstick comedian, who made sixteen films together.
What artist was most known for his quintessential depictions of American life on the covers of The Saturday Evening Post?
What rock band had hits with "Bad Moon Rising" and "Proud Mary."
What two teams met in the first Super Bowl in 1967?
questions.answer: Kansas City Chiefs; Green Bay Packers

questions.question: What product's slogan was, "Does she or doesn't she? Only her hairdresser knows for sure."
